query:
SELECT d.revoked_at,
                   EXISTS(
                       SELECT 1
                       FROM device_delegations dd
                       WHERE dd.account_id = $1
                         AND dd.device_id = $2
                         AND dd.revoked_at IS NULL
                         AND (dd.expires_at IS NULL OR dd.expires_at > NOW())
                   ) as "has_active_delegation!"
            FROM devices d
            WHERE d.account_id = $1 AND d.id = $2
